... [280 lines omitted] ...
142→ raise ValueError(f"Invalid value {value!r}, expected one of {args}") 174→ raise ValueError(f"Expected boolean, got {type(value).__name__}") 178→ raise ValueError("Expected integer, got boolean") 221→ raise TypeError( 235→ json.JSONDecodeError: If stdin contains invalid JSON 236→ ValueError: If stdin JSON is not an object 245→ raise ValueError("JSON input must be an object") 255→def emit_json_error(*, error_type: str, message: str) -> None: 256→ """Emit a structured error to stdout.""" 257→ data = {"success": False, "error_type": error_type, "message": message} 273→ raise TypeError( 291→ raise ValueError(f"Unknown field: {key}") 302→ raise ValueError(f"Missing required field: {name}")

session.user:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The conversation is summarized below: Analysis: Let me carefully analyze this conversation to create a comprehensive summary.
## What was requested
The user invoked `/erk:plan-implement 9287` - a command that implements a documentation plan from GitHub. This is plan #9287 which is a "Consolidated Documentation Updates from 35 Learn Sessions" plan.
## Setup Phase 1. `erk exec setup-impl --issue 9287` was run - detected the branch `plnd/consolidate-learn-docs-03-20-2014` already checked out, set up the impl directory at `.erk/impl-context/plnd--consolidate-learn-docs-03-20-2014` 2. The plan was read from `plan.md` - it has 14 implementation steps covering documentation updates
## Implementation Steps Completed
### Step 1: Fix stale `[plans]` → `[github]` config references Files updated: - `docs/learned/configuration/config-layers.md` - Changed `[plans]` to `[github]` in section list and `plans.repo` to `github.repo` in merge semantics - `docs/learned/configuration/issues-repo.md` - Updated TOML code blocks from `[plans]` to `[github]`, updated read_when - `docs/learned/planning/cross-repo-plans.md` - Updated read_when and TOML block - `docs/learned/glossary.md` - Updated TOML block and merge semantics - `docs/learned/planning/index.md` - Updated the cross-repo-plans entry
### Step 2: Update PlanBackend → ManagedPrBackend references The actual ABC class is now `ManagedPrBackend` (confirmed in source at `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/backend.py:51`).
Files updated: - `docs/learned/architecture/plan-backend-migration.md` - Updated title, read_when, body to use `ManagedPrBackend` - `docs/learned/architecture/gateway-vs-backend.md` - Updated read_when, tripwire, example - `docs/learned/architecture/erk-architecture.md` - Updated ctx.plan_backend description - `docs/learned/architecture/index.md` - Updated index entries
### Step 3: Rewrite rebase-confirmation-workflow.md The command `erk pr rebase` was replaced by `erk pr resolve-conflicts` (confirmed in `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py`). The new command: - Requires a rebase already in progress - Does NOT initiate a rebase - Shows conflicted files, asks confirmation, launches Claude with `/erk:pr-resolve-conflicts`
Files updated: - `docs/learned/cli/rebase-confirmation-workflow.md` - Complete rewrite - `docs/learned/cli/workflow-commands.md` - Updated pr rebase references - `docs/learned/cli/index.md` - Updated index entry - `docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-diverge-fix.md` - Updated reference - `docs/learned/architecture/rebase-conflict-patterns.md` - Updated Two-Phase section
### Step 4: Verify and fix stale function references - `import-conflict-resolution.md` - Updated example code to use `parse_pr_number_from_url` instead of non-existent `parse_plan_number` - `workflow-run-list.md` - Verified `extract_plan_number()` and `extract_pr_number()` both still exist in source - no changes needed
### Step 5: Verify TUI field names The dataclass is now `PrRowData` (not `PlanRowData`). Fields `plan_id`, `plan_url`, `plan_body` → `pr_number`, `pr_url`, `pr_body`.
Files updated: - `docs/learned/tui/plan-row-data.md` - Updated title, frontmatter, class name, field names
### Step 6: Update runs-tab-architecture.md with new column Added `pr_status_display: str` to RunRowData fields and `pr-st` column to column config.
Files updated: - `docs/learned/tui/runs-tab-architecture.md` - Updated fields table and column config
### Step 7: Create impl-failure-summarization.md Created new file documenting the failure summarization flow in plan-implement.yml.
File created: `docs/learned/ci/impl-failure-summarization.md`
### Step 8: Update prompt-executor docs for stdin/ARG_MAX Added new section to subprocess-wrappers.md about `input=prompt` pattern.
Files updated: - `docs/learned/architecture/subprocess-wrappers.md` - Added "Prompt Delivery via stdin" section and updated Summary
### Step 9: Create npx-skill-management.md File created: `docs/learned/capabilities/npx-skill-management.md`
### Step 10: Create skill-deletion-patterns.md File created: `docs/learned/capabilities/skill-deletion-patterns.md`
### Step 11: Create teleport-slot-awareness.md File created: `docs/learned/cli/teleport-slot-awareness.md`
### Step 12: Create uv-workspace-configuration.md File created: `docs/learned/config/uv-workspace-configuration.md`
### Step 13: Create new docs from mega-plan #9167 (IN PROGRESS) Creating 5 new docs: 1. `docs/learned/testing/fakes-directory-structure.md` - CREATED 2. `docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-management.md` - CREATED 3. `docs/learned/architecture/json-dataclass-utilities.md` - CREATED (was just being created when summary was requested) 4. `docs/learned/cli/exec-review-activity-log.md` - PENDING 5. `docs/learned/erk/stack-sync.md` - PENDING
### Step 14: Update index files and tripwires - PENDING
### Run CI and submit PR - PENDING
## Errors Encountered 1. `Edit` tool sometimes requires a fresh `Read` call before editing - encountered this with `plan-row-data.md` and `subprocess-wrappers.md`, fixed by re-reading the file first.
## Key Technical Details - Branch: `plnd/consolidate-learn-docs-03-20-2014` - PR: #9287 - Plan title: "Consolidated Documentation Updates from 35 Learn Sessions" - Source plans: 35 merged PRs - `[github]` config section replaces old `[plans]` section (with backwards compat) - `ManagedPrBackend` replaced `PlanBackend` as ABC name - `erk pr resolve-conflicts` replaced `erk pr rebase` - `PrRowData` replaced `PlanRowData` as the TUI row dataclass name - Teleport command adds slot awareness (matching `erk br co` behavior) - UV workspace uses explicit member list (not globs) to handle stray directories
<summary> 1. Primary Request and Intent: The user invoked `/erk:plan-implement 9287` to implement plan #9287 — "Consolidated Documentation Updates from 35 Learn Sessions." This plan consolidates documentation changes from 35 merged PRs into a single implementation. The intent is to update/create documentation files in `docs/learned/` to reflect completed code changes that were previously undocumented or had stale references.
2. Key Technical Concepts: - **erk plan implementation workflow**: `erk exec setup-impl --issue <N>` sets up a branch and impl directory; signals are sent to GitHub to track progress - **`[github]` config section**: The TOML config section was renamed from `[plans]` to `[github]` (with backwards compat via `[plans]` fallback) - **`ManagedPrBackend`**: The ABC class formerly known as `PlanBackend` was renamed; `PlannedPRBackend` is still the implementation class name - **`erk pr resolve-conflicts`**: Replaced `erk pr rebase`; key difference is it only handles in-progress rebases, does NOT initiate them - **`PrRowData`**: The TUI row dataclass renamed from `PlanRowData`; fields renamed from `plan_id/plan_url/plan_body` to `pr_number/pr_url/pr_body` - **RunRowData `pr_status_display`**: New field and `pr-st` column added to the Runs tab - **Impl failure summarization**: Uses Claude Haiku to analyze session JSONL on CI failures; output posted as PR comment and job summary - **Prompt delivery via stdin**: `input=prompt` in `subprocess.run()` avoids ARG_MAX overflow for large prompts - **NPX skills management**: Skills distributed from external GitHub repos via `skills@1.4.5`; tracked in `skills-lock.json`; `_UNBUNDLED_SKILLS` registry in `bundled.py` - **Skill tombstone pattern**: Deleted skills need a minimal SKILL.md tombstone to overwrite stale installations in external repos - **Teleport slot awareness**: `erk pr teleport` in-place now updates slot assignments (matching `erk br co` behavior) - **UV workspace explicit members**: Root `pyproject.toml` uses explicit `members` list (not globs) to avoid stray directory issues - **JSON/dataclass utilities**: `erk_shared.agentclick.dataclass_json` provides `parse_dataclass_from_json`, `serialize_to_json_dict`, `dataclass_result_schema` etc.
3. Files and Code Sections:
**Modified Files:**
- **`docs/learned/configuration/config-layers.md`** - Changed `[plans]` → `[github]` in section list; `plans.repo` → `github.repo` in merge semantics table
- **`docs/learned/configuration/issues-repo.md`** - Changed TOML code blocks from `[plans]` to `[github]`; updated `read_when` entry from "plans.repo" to "github.repo"
- **`docs/learned/planning/cross-repo-plans.md`** - Updated `read_when` and TOML code block; changed "When `[plans] repo` is configured" to "When `[github] repo` is configured"
- **`docs/learned/glossary.md`** - Updated TOML code block (`[plans]` → `[github]`) and merge semantics bullet (`plans.repo` → `github.repo`)
- **`docs/learned/planning/index.md`** - Updated cross-repo-plans entry to say `[github]` instead of `[plans]`
- **`docs/learned/architecture/plan-backend-migration.md`** - Updated title to "ManagedPrBackend Migration Pattern"; updated `read_when`, `tripwires`, body references from `PlanBackend` to `ManagedPrBackend`
- **`docs/learned/architecture/gateway-vs-backend.md`** - Updated `read_when` entry; added note to tripwire about `ManagedPrBackend` name; updated example from `PlanBackend` to `ManagedPrBackend`
- **`docs/learned/architecture/erk-architecture.md`** - Updated `ctx.plan_backend` description to reference `ManagedPrBackend`; updated source comment and source reference
- **`docs/learned/architecture/index.md`** - Updated two entries referencing `PlanBackend` → `ManagedPrBackend`
- **`docs/learned/cli/rebase-confirmation-workflow.md`** (complete rewrite) - Completely rewritten to document `erk pr resolve-conflicts` instead of `erk pr rebase` - New content describes: requires active rebase, scope, confirmation pattern, options, slash command `/erk:pr-resolve-conflicts`
- **`docs/learned/cli/workflow-commands.md`** - Updated "Local vs Remote Duality" section: `pr rebase` → `pr resolve-conflicts`, `rebase_cmd.py` → `resolve_conflicts_cmd.py` - Updated Plan Dispatch section: removed `pr-rebase` from workflow list - Updated anti-patterns section (removed `erk pr rebase-remote` example reference)
- **`docs/learned/cli/index.md`** - Updated rebase-confirmation-workflow.md entry to reference `erk pr resolve-conflicts`
- **`docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-diverge-fix.md`** - Updated: "`erk pr rebase`" → "`erk pr resolve-conflicts` - Fix conflicts in an in-progress rebase (not divergence)"
- **`docs/learned/architecture/rebase-conflict-patterns.md`** - Replaced "Two-Phase Rebase Pattern" section with "Resolve-Conflicts Command" documenting new behavior
- **`docs/learned/testing/import-conflict-resolution.md`** - Updated example code to use `parse_pr_number_from_url` instead of non-existent `parse_plan_number`; also fixed the grep path from `src/erk_shared/github/parsing.py` to `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/parsing.py`
- **`docs/learned/tui/plan-row-data.md`** - Updated title/frontmatter: `PlanRowData` → `PrRowData` - Updated field section: removed `plan_id`, `plan_url`, `plan_body`; added `pr_number`, `pr_url`, `pr_body` - Updated body references from `PlanRowData` to `PrRowData`
- **`docs/learned/tui/runs-tab-architecture.md`** - Added fields to RunRowData table: `pr_state`, `pr_title`, `pr_status_display`, `run_id_display`, `title_display` - Added `pr-st` (key `pr_st`, width 6) column to column config; added explanatory note
- **`docs/learned/architecture/subprocess-wrappers.md`** - Added new section "Prompt Delivery via stdin (ARG_MAX Prevention)" with pattern, when-to-use, and distinction from shell `--body-file` pattern - Updated Summary section to include stdin bullet
**Created Files:**
- **`docs/learned/ci/impl-failure-summarization.md`** (NEW) - Documents flow: session JSONL → tail extraction → `generate_compressed_xml()` → Haiku analysis → PR comment + job summary - Covers: exec script location, options, session capture, prompt template, Haiku model selection rationale, integration point in `plan-implement.yml`
- **`docs/learned/capabilities/npx-skill-management.md`** (NEW) - Documents `.agents/skills/` canonical directory, symlinks to `.claude/skills/`, `skills-lock.json` - Lists current npx-managed skills (dignified-python, fake-driven-testing, fdt-refactor-mock-to-fake, graphite, skill-creator) - Documents `_UNBUNDLED_SKILLS` registry, migration workflow, skill distribution type comparison
- **`docs/learned/capabilities/skill-deletion-patterns.md`** (NEW) - Documents tombstone pattern, why tombstones are needed, complete 6-location deletion checklist - Documents when tombstone vs complete removal, two-phase deletion pattern example (erk-planning)
- **`docs/learned/cli/teleport-slot-awareness.md`** (NEW) - Documents in-place vs new-slot teleport slot update behavior - Documents `_navigate_to_existing_worktree()` shared helper extraction - Includes slot update code snippet from `_teleport_in_place()`
- **`docs/learned/config/uv-workspace-configuration.md`** (NEW) - Documents explicit member list in `[tool.uv.workspace]` - Explains why globs are not used (stray directories cause `uv sync` failure) - Includes step-by-step guide for adding new workspace packages
- **`docs/learned/testing/fakes-directory-structure.md`** (NEW) - Documents that fakes live in `tests/fakes/`, not `src/` - Documents `tests/fakes/gateway/` vs `tests/fakes/tests/` distinction - Includes tripwire for creating fakes in src/
- **`docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-management.md`** (NEW) - Documents `erk workflow run cancel <run_id>` and `erk workflow run retry <run_id>` commands - Covers `--failed` option for retry, gateway methods used
- **`docs/learned/architecture/json-dataclass-utilities.md`** (NEW — just created at summary point) - Documents `erk_shared.agentclick.dataclass_json` module - Covers `parse_dataclass_from_json`, `coerce_json_value`, `serialize_to_json_dict`, `dataclass_result_schema`, I/O helpers - Documents error schema convention
4. Errors and Fixes: - **`Edit` tool "File has not been read yet"**: When trying to edit `docs/learned/tui/plan-row-data.md` and `docs/learned/architecture/subprocess-wrappers.md`, the tool rejected edits because the file reads were from earlier in the conversation session. Fixed by doing a small `Read` call at offset to "re-read" the file in the current tool context before applying the edit.
5. Problem Solving: - **Verification of actual source**: For each documentation update, the actual source code was checked (e.g., `grep -n 'class.*Backend'` to find the actual ABC class name, `ls pr/` to confirm `rebase_cmd.py` is gone, reading `types.py` to verify `PrRowData` field names). This avoided documenting incorrect information. - **Stale reference cascade**: The `[plans]` → `[github]` change was more widespread than the 4 files listed in the plan — also found in `planning/index.md`. Fixed proactively. - **`pr rebase` reference cascade**: Similar to above, found additional files referencing the old command beyond those listed in the plan.
6. All User Messages: - `/erk:plan-implement 9287` (the initial command invocation with the full slash command specification document) - The summary request (current message)
7. Pending Tasks: - **Step 13 (partially done)**: Create new docs from mega-plan #9167 — remaining: - `docs/learned/cli/exec-review-activity-log.md` (source read: `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_review_activity_log.py`) - `docs/learned/erk/stack-sync.md` (source read: `src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py`) - **Step 14**: Update index files and tripwires for all newly created docs: - `docs/learned/ci/index.md` — add impl-failure-summarization.md - `docs/learned/capabilities/index.md` — add npx-skill-management.md, skill-deletion-patterns.md - `docs/learned/cli/index.md` — add teleport-slot-awareness.md, workflow-run-management.md, exec-review-activity-log.md - `docs/learned/config/index.md` — add uv-workspace-configuration.md - `docs/learned/testing/index.md` — add fakes-directory-structure.md - `docs/learned/erk/index.md` — add stack-sync.md - `docs/learned/architecture/index.md` — add json-dataclass-utilities.md - **Signal GitHub Ended** (`erk exec impl-signal ended`) - **Upload session** (`erk exec upload-impl-session`) - **Cleanup impl context** (`erk exec cleanup-impl-context`) - **Run CI** (check CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md for commands) - **Submit PR** (`erk pr submit`)
8. Current Work: Immediately before the summary request, Step 13 was in progress — creating 5 new docs from mega-plan #9167. The following were just created: - `docs/learned/testing/fakes-directory-structure.md` ✓ - `docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-management.md` ✓ - `docs/learned/architecture/json-dataclass-utilities.md` ✓ (the most recently created file)
Two more docs remain to be created (exec-review-activity-log.md and stack-sync.md), using source files already read: - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_review_activity_log.py` (already read) - `src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py` (already read)
9. Optional Next Step: Continue with Step 13 — create the remaining two docs:
From the plan: `"docs/learned/cli/exec-review-activity-log.md" — Document erk exec get-review-activity-log push-down command` and `"docs/learned/erk/stack-sync.md" — Document erk stack sync hidden command`.
The source for `exec-review-activity-log.md` was read from `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_review_activity_log.py` which showed a command that: - Takes `--pr-number` and `--marker` options - Finds a PR comment containing the HTML marker - Extracts `### Activity Log` section - Returns JSON: `{"success": true, "found": bool, "activity_log": "..."}` - Always exits 0
The source for `stack-sync.md` was read from `src/erk/cli/commands/stack/sync_cmd.py` which showed a hidden command (`hidden=True`) that: - Requires Graphite (`cls=GraphiteCommand`) - Fetches remote state for all stack branches - Fast-forwards or rebases each branch - Restacks after sync - Reports: `BranchSyncAction` types (ALREADY_SYNCED, FAST_FORWARDED, REBASED, SKIPPED_NO_REMOTE, SKIPPED_OTHER_WORKTREE, CONFLICT, ERROR) - On conflict, suggests `erk pr diverge-fix`. Please continue the conversation from where we left it off without asking the user any further questions. Continue with the last task that you were asked to work on.

tool_use.name: TodoWrite
tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Step 1: Fix stale [plans] → [github] config references', 'status': 'complete...[truncated 2080 chars]...Run CI and submit PR', 'status': 'pending', 'activeForm': 'Running CI and submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant: Continuing with Step 13 — creating the two remaining docs. Let me read the source files to refresh context.
session.tool_result:
1→"""Fetch the activity log from an existing review summary comment. 2→ 3→This exec command finds the PR comment containing the given marker 4→and extracts the Activity Log section from it. 5→ 6→Usage: 7→ erk exec get-review-activity-log --pr-number 123 \\ 8→ --marker "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->" 9→ 10→Output: 11→ JSON with found status and activity log text 12→ 13→Exit Codes: 14→ 0: Always (even on error, to support || true pattern) 15→ 16→Examples: 17→ $ erk exec get-review-activity-log --pr-number 123 \\ 18→ --marker "<!-- audit-pr-docs -->" 19→ {"success": true, "found": true, "activity_log": "- [2024-01-01] ..."} 20→ 21→ $ erk exec get-review-activity-log --pr-number 123 \\ 22→ --marker "<!-- no-such-marker -->" 23→ {"success": true, "found": false, "activity_log": ""} 24→""" 25→ 26→import json 27→ 28→import click 29→ 30→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_github, require_repo_root
... [56 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Sync all stack branches with their remote tracking branches.""" 2→ 3→import click 4→ 5→from erk.cli.core import discover_repo_context 6→from erk.cli.graphite_command import GraphiteCommand 7→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 8→from erk.core.stack_sync import BranchSyncAction, StackSyncResult, sync_stack 9→ 10→ 11→@click.command("sync", cls=GraphiteCommand, hidden=True) 12→@click.pass_obj 13→def sync_stack_cmd(ctx: ErkContext) -> None: 14→ """Sync all stack branches with their remote tracking branches. 15→ 16→ Fetches remote state and resolves divergences across the entire Graphite 17→ stack. For each non-trunk branch, checks if the remote has new commits 18→ and fast-forwards or rebases as needed. After syncing, restacks the 19→ entire stack. 20→ 21→ If a rebase has conflicts, aborts the rebase and suggests using 22→ 'erk pr diverge-fix' for that specific branch. 23→ """ 24→ repo = discover_repo_context(ctx, ctx.cwd) 25→ 26→ click.echo("Fetching remote state...") 27→ click.echo("") 28→ 29→ result = sync_stack(ctx, repo_root=repo.root, cwd=ctx.cwd) 30→
... [81 lines omitted] ...
31→ # Handle fatal errors (detached HEAD, not tracked) 32→ if not result.branch_results and result.restack_error is not None: 33→ click.echo(f"Error: {result.restack_error}", err=True) 65→ case BranchSyncAction.ERROR: 66→ return click.style(f"error: {detail}", fg="red") 75→ elif result.restack_error is not None: 76→ click.echo(f"Restacking... {click.style('failed', fg='red')}: {result.restack_error}")
session.assistant: Now let me also check the `sync_stack` core function for more details:
session.tool_result:
1→"""Sync all stack branches with their remote tracking branches. 2→ 3→Provides mechanical stack-wide divergence resolution: 4→1. Gets the full branch stack 5→2. Fetches all remote state in one call 6→3. For each non-trunk branch (bottom-to-top): checks divergence, fixes it 7→4. Re-tracks all fixed branches with Graphite 8→5. Restacks the entire stack 9→6. Returns to the original branch 10→""" 11→ 12→from __future__ import annotations 13→ 14→from dataclasses import dataclass 15→from enum import Enum 16→from pathlib import Path 17→ 18→from erk_shared.context.context import ErkContext 19→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import BranchDivergence 20→from erk_shared.gateway.git.remote_ops.types import PullRebaseError 21→ 22→ 23→class BranchSyncAction(Enum): 24→ ALREADY_SYNCED = "already_synced" 25→ FAST_FORWARDED = "fast_forwarded" 26→ REBASED = "rebased" 27→ SKIPPED_NO_REMOTE = "skipped_no_remote" 28→ SKIPPED_OTHER_WORKTREE = "skipped_other_worktree" 29→ CONFLICT = "conflict" 30→ ERROR = "error"
... [269 lines omitted] ...
44→ restack_error: str | None 65→ restack_error="Not on a branch (detached HEAD state)", 74→ restack_error=f"Branch '{current_branch}' is not tracked by Graphite", 82→ restack_error=None, 110→ restack_success, restack_error = ctx.graphite.restack(cwd) 120→ restack_error=restack_error, 224→ if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError): 227→ action=BranchSyncAction.ERROR, 239→ action=BranchSyncAction.ERROR, 288→ if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError):
session.assistant: Now I have enough context to create both remaining docs. Let me create them in parallel:

session.tool_result:
1→<!-- AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY --> 2→<!-- Edit source frontmatter, then run 'erk docs sync' to regenerate. --> 3→ 4→# Ci Documentation 5→ 6→- **[automated-review-system.md](automated-review-system.md)** — understanding what automated reviews run on PRs, debugging unexpected review comments on a PR, adding a new automated review bot, understanding re-review triggers 7→- **[check-state-classification.md](check-state-classification.md)** — modifying how CI check states are counted or displayed, understanding why planned PRs show 0/0 checks, working with PASSING_CHECK_RUN_STATES or SKIPPED_CHECK_RUN_STATES 8→- **[ci-failure-summarization.md](ci-failure-summarization.md)** — working with CI failure summaries or ERK-CI-SUMMARY markers, modifying the ci-summarize workflow job, understanding how TUI displays CI failure details, debugging CI summary parsing or matching 9→- **[ci-iteration.md](ci-iteration.md)** — running CI converting gateway operations to discriminated unions, deciding where try/except blocks belong in gateways 53→- **[gateway-specific-patterns.md](gateway-specific-patterns.md)** — considering mixing discriminated unions with exceptions in gateway methods, designing operations with both expected failures and cleanup steps, reviewing historical gateway error handling experiments 60→- **[github-api-diagnostics.md](github-api-diagnostics.md)** — debugging GitHub API failures, investigating repository-specific API issues, GitHub CLI commands returning unexpected errors 61→- **[github-api-rate-limits.md](github-api-rate-limits.md)** — using gh CLI commands programmatically, encountering GraphQL rate limit errors, choosing between REST and GraphQL API, implementing GitHub API calls in gateways 62→- **[github-api-retry-mechanism.md](github-api-retry-mechanism.md)** — implementing GitHub API calls with retry logic, handling transient network errors, using execute_gh_command_with_retry(), injecting Time for testable retry delays 63→- **[github-cli-limits.md](github-cli-limits.md)** — using gh pr diff in production code, working with large pull requests (300+ files), encountering HTTP 406 errors from gh CLI, implementing PR file discovery, working with GitHub codespaces in code, implementing codespace operations 91→- **[multi-worktree-state.md](multi-worktree-state.md)** — checkout operations in multi-worktree repositories, landing PRs with worktree cleanup, understanding git single-checkout constraint, debugging checkout failures across worktrees 93→- **[not-found-sentinel.md](not-found-sentinel.md)** — designing return types for lookup operations, handling missing resource cases without exceptions, checking if get_pr_for_branch() returned a PR, working with GitHub PR lookup results 96→- **[parameter-threading-pattern.md](parameter-threading-pattern.md)** — adding parameters to multi-layer commands (skill → command → exec), working with slash commands that call erk exec, debugging "No such option" errors in commands 107→- **[pr-footer-validation.md](pr-footer-validation.md)** — working with PR metadata footer format, modifying PR footer generation or parsing, debugging PR footer extraction errors 114→- **[rebase-conflict-patterns.md](rebase-conflict-patterns.md)** — resolving merge conflicts after rebase, debugging test failures after rebase, handling auto-generated file conflicts, resuming a rebase with conflicts 115→- **[ref-json-migration.md](ref-json-migration.md)** — working with plan-ref.json or ref.json, understanding plan reference file formats, debugging plan reference loading failures 119→- **[sentinel-path-compatibility.md](sentinel-path-compatibility.md)** — writing functions that check path existence, seeing 'Called .exists() on sentinel path' errors, making functions testable with FakeGit 130→- **[threading-patterns.md](threading-patterns.md)** — running blocking operations (subprocess, network) while yielding progress events, implementing daemon threads for long-running tasks, understanding the result holder + error holder pattern, testing code that uses background threads 132→- **[validation-patterns.md](validation-patterns.md)** — adding regex validation to a field or input, implementing input validation with error messages, understanding module-level regex compilation
